title: anthemis pallida
intro: Anthemis pallida, also known as White Chamomile, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and soothing properties. The medicinal properties of Anthemis pallida include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce anxiety and insomnia, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of White Chamomile, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, have been used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe menstrual cramps.
